# SkillCooldownKind enumeration

Matches the wire enum `ESkillCDType`.

```csharp
public enum SkillCooldownKind
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `0` | Standard single-charge cooldown. |
| Charge | `1` | Multi-charge cooldown (skill can be used up to `ChargeCount` times before the cooldown starts). |
